description: Under the constitution written by the mythical lawgiver Lycurgus, the institution of the Agoge was established, where Spartans were trained from the age of 6 to be superior warriors in defense of the Spartan state.
tooltip: Champion Hoplites are available in p1 and -10% repeat time compared other champion spearman.  As Young Hoplites (Paidiskoi) they cost -50 food and metal and take only 16 seconds to train.  However, they do 25% less dmg, have -2 hack/pierce resitance and -25 health.  They promote to normal Spartiates (Hebontes) which are avialble to train p2 and can eventualy promote to Olympic Spartiates (Hippeis)
